name: Manning Ventures Inc.
description: Manning Ventures Inc. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of energy metal projects in North America. The company is dedicated to driving shareholder value through the exploration and discovery of critical materials, including lithium and copper, which are essential for the global transition to sustainable energy and the electrification of the economy. Led by a seasoned management team, Manning Ventures actively pursues geologically favorable and underexplored assets, utilizing methodical exploration strategies to identify and develop high-potential resources that support the growing demand for clean energy technologies.
